login.name: Name
login.bootstrapBody: This instance is configured to bootstrap with {{email}}. Choose a password to complete owner setup.
magicLink.title: Magic link
magicLink.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to sign in without a password.
magicLink.sentDescription: If an account exists with this email, you will receive a sign-in link.
login.termsNotice: By clicking continue, you agree to our
forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.sentDescription: If an account exists with this email, you will receive a reset link.
resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.description: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.invalidToken: This link is invalid or has expired
resetPassword.successDescription: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now sign in.
verifyEmail.title: Check your email
verifyEmail.description: A verification email has been sent to {{email}}. Click the link in the email to activate your account.
preferences.linkedAccountsDescription: Manage the sign-in methods linked to your account.
preferences.cannotUnlinkLast: You must keep at least one sign-in method.
createOrg.title: New organization
createOrg.name: Name
createOrg.slugHint: Unique identifier in lowercase (letters, numbers, hyphens).
orgCliSessions.title: Member CLI sessions
orgCliSessions.description: View every active CLI / GitHub Action session for members of this organization. Revoking a session immediately signs the device out.
orgCliSessions.emptyDescription: Members currently have no open CLI or GitHub Action sessions on their accounts.
orgCliSessions.confirmRevokeDescription: “{{device}}” used by {{user}} will be signed out. The member will need to run `appstrate login` to reconnect.
orgSettings.dashboardSsoDesc: Allow internal tools to authenticate against this organization via OAuth 2.1 / OIDC. Only enable if you specifically need SSO for the dashboard.
orgSettings.mcpDesc: Connect any MCP client to this organization. Authentication (OAuth) is discovered automatically — paste the server URL into your client, or use a shortcut below.
orgSettings.mcpEndpointHint: Works with any spec-compliant MCP client. The tabs below are just shortcuts.
orgSettings.mcpClaudeCodeHint: Run this command in your terminal.
orgSettings.mcpJsonHint: Add this block to your MCP configuration file.
orgSettings.mcpGenericHint: Standard "mcpServers" block, compatible with most clients (Windsurf, Cline, Continue, …).
orgSettings.mcpRemoteHint: For clients that don't yet support remote HTTP/OAuth transport: the "mcp-remote" bridge exposes the server over local stdio.
orgSettings.mcpManualFallback: Button not working? Add this configuration manually instead:
orgSettings.deleteOrgDesc: All agents, runs, schedules and configurations will be deleted.
orgSettings.deleteConfirm: Delete organization "{{name}}"? All data will be lost. This action is irreversible.
packages.title: Packages
packages.emptyItemsHint: Upload an AFPS file containing a {{type}}
packages.deleteConfirm: Delete {{type}} "{{name}}"? This will permanently remove it from the organization.
packages.deleteConfirmWithApps: Delete {{type}} "{{name}}"? It is currently installed in: {{apps}}. This will permanently remove it from all applications.
packages.uninstallConfirm: Uninstall "{{name}}" from this application? You can reinstall it later from the library.
schedules.title: Schedules
schedules.emptyHint: Add a schedule to run an agent automatically.
preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.emailConflict: This email address is already in use.
preferences.emailChangeVerificationSent: A verification email has been sent to {{email}}. Your email will be updated after verification.
preferences.verificationLinkExpired: The verification link has expired or is invalid.
file.dragDrop: Drag and drop or click to select
file.uploadsDisabled: File uploads are not configured for this form.
invite.description: {{inviter}} invites you to join the organization {{org}} on Appstrate.
invite.invalid: This invitation is invalid or not found.
invite.alreadyAccepted: This invitation has already been accepted.
invite.emailMismatch: You are signed in as {{userEmail}}, but this invitation is for {{inviteEmail}}.
welcome.subtitle: Welcome! Set up your profile to get started.
appAuth.smtpHint: Configure the SMTP transport used to send verification emails, magic links and password resets for OAuth clients referencing this application. Without a config these features are disabled — no fallback to instance SMTP.
appAuth.smtpPassReuploadHint: Leave empty to keep the current password.
appAuth.smtpDeleteConfirm: Verification emails and magic links will be disabled for OAuth clients referencing this application.
appAuth.socialHint: Register your tenant's {{provider}} OAuth App credentials. Without a config the button is hidden on login pages of OAuth clients referencing this application.
appAuth.socialSecretReuploadHint: Leave empty to keep the current secret.
appAuth.socialDeleteConfirm: The {{provider}} button will be hidden on login pages of OAuth clients referencing this application.
oauthClients.introOrg: Register OAuth 2.1 clients so internal tools (dashboards, bots) can authenticate your team members against this organization.
oauthClients.introApp: Register OAuth 2.1 clients so external applications can authenticate this application's end-users via OIDC.
oauthClients.redirectUrisHint: Where the user is sent after authorization. HTTPS required (except localhost for development).
oauthClients.redirectUrisRequired: At least one redirect URI is required.
oauthClients.postLogoutRedirectUrisHint: Where the user is sent after logout (OIDC RP-Initiated Logout). Without this, satellite users are redirected to Appstrate after signing out. HTTPS required (except localhost).
oauthClients.rotateConfirm: The previous secret is invalidated immediately. Applications using it must be updated.
oauthClients.deleteConfirm: This cannot be undone. Applications using this client will stop working.
oauthClients.scopesHint: Select the permissions this client can request. openid, profile, and email are always granted. Changes apply to new authorizations; previously issued tokens keep their original scopes.
oauthClients.nameReadonlyHint: The client name cannot be changed after creation.
oauthClients.isFirstPartyHint: Trusted clients skip the user consent screen. Reserved for internal applications.
oauthClients.allowSignupHint: When enabled, users signing in for the first time through this client are provisioned on the fly (user creation plus, for org-level clients, auto-join with the role below; end-user creation for application-level clients). When disabled, only pre-existing users can sign in; unknown users are rejected with a clear error.
oauthClients.signupRoleHint: Owner is intentionally unavailable — use the members page to promote a user to owner.
apiKeys.createdWarning: Copy this key now. It will not be shown again.
apiKeys.revokeConfirm: Revoke API key "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
apiKeys.emptyHint: Create an API key to access the API programmatically.
connections.connectMore: Go to organization integrations to connect more services
connections.noConnectionsHint: Connect a service from the integrations below.
connections.deleteConfirmImpact_one: This connection is used by {{count}} agent in the application — deleting it will make it unavailable for them.
connections.deleteConfirmImpact_other: This connection is used by {{count}} agents in the application — deleting it will make them unavailable for them.
connections.descriptionUnified: All your external connections, across every organization.
connections.shareWithOrgLabel: Make this connection available to other members of this organization
connections.reusedByCount_one: {{count}} agent uses it in this application
connections.reusedByCount_other: {{count}} agents use it in this application
integration.admin.orgDefault.title: Default connection (admin)
integration.admin.orgDefault.help: One connection used by every agent that uses this integration. Enforce it to lock members, or leave it as a soft default they can override.
integration.admin.orgDefault.noPinnableC: No shared connection available. Ask a member to enable sharing on their connection, or create one yourself.
integration.admin.exceptions.title: Per-agent exceptions (admin)
integration.admin.exceptions.help: Override the default for specific agents. An exception wins over the default for that agent.
integration.admin.pinManagement.noPinnab: No shared connection available. Ask a member to enable sharing on their connection, or create one yourself.
integration.admin.pinManagement.noConsum: No installed agent uses this integration, or every (agent, auth) pair is already pinned.
integration.setup_guide.title: Setup guide
devices.title: Active CLI sessions
devices.description: Devices currently signed in with the Appstrate CLI or GitHub Action. Revoke a session to force a re-login on that device.
devices.emptyDescription: Sign in with the CLI or GitHub Action to see your devices here.
devices.confirmRevokeDescription: “{{name}}” will lose access to your account. The user will need to sign in again with `appstrate login`.
devices.confirmRevokeAllDescription: All CLI sessions will be signed out. You will need to run `appstrate login` on each device to reconnect.
proxies.title: Organization Proxies
proxies.modal.label: Name
proxies.agent.label: Proxy
models.form.title: Add model
models.form.label: Name
models.form.capabilitiesHint: Optional: these values override automatic SDK detection.
packages.deleteDependedOn: Cannot delete: required by other packages
onboarding.waitingSubtitle: This Appstrate instance runs in invitation-only mode. Ask an administrator to invite you to an existing organization to access the platform.
onboarding.createSubtitle: An organization groups your agents, integrations, and members.
onboarding.planSubtitle: Select the plan that fits your needs. You can change it later.
onboarding.modelSubtitle: Add an LLM model to run your agents. You can add more later.
onboarding.modelSeed.connectHint: OAuth handshake + featured models added automatically.
onboarding.modelSeed.alreadyConnectedHin: Manage this connection later from settings.
onboarding.membersSubtitle: Invite collaborators by email. They will receive an invitation link.
onboarding.doneSubtitle: Your organization is configured. Here's a summary.
credentials.title: Model Provider Keys
credentials.deleteConfirm: Delete key "{{label}}"? Linked models will need to be reconfigured.
credentials.emptyHint: Add a key to share it across multiple models.
credentials.form.title: Add model provider key
credentials.form.label: Name
credentials.form.apiKeyHint: Leave empty to keep the current key.
credentials.oauth.cliInstructions: Run this command in your terminal to complete the connection:
credentials.oauth.dismissConfirmDescript: The displayed command will disappear. A connection in progress will still finish in the background.
credentials.oauth.pairingExpired: This command has expired (5 minutes). Generate a new one to continue.
models.form.noCredentials: No keys available for this provider
models.form.createCredentialHint: A model provider key will be created automatically.
models.form.connectProviderHint: Starts the OAuth flow through the CLI helper; a new connection will appear here as soon as it completes.
models.form.detectingModels: Detecting the models available on this plan…
models.form.noModelsDetected: No model detected for this connection. Try refreshing, or check that the subscription is active.
models.form.connectionRequired: Select a connection or connect an account before saving.
models.form.apiKeyRequired: Enter an API key or pick an existing one.
models.alert.noModelDescription: Configure a model in organization settings to run this agent.
billing.pastDueDescription: Stripe will automatically retry. Update your payment method to avoid service interruption.
billing.cancelingWarning: Your subscription will be canceled on {{date}}. You can reactivate it from the management portal.
applications.nameHint: Identifies this application (e.g. My prod app)
applications.redirectDomainsHint: Allowed domains for end-user OAuth callbacks
applications.emptyHint: Create an application to manage your end-users and their connections.
applications.deleteConfirm: Delete application "{{name}}"? All end-users and their data will be removed.
applications.cannotDeleteDefault: The default application cannot be deleted.
applications.deleteDesc: This action is irreversible. All end-users, their connections and runs will be deleted.
applications.noAppSelected: No application selected. Please select one from the sidebar.
applications.noEndUsersHint: Create an end-user via the API or the button below.
applications.deleteEndUserConfirm: Delete this end-user? Their connections and runs will be deleted.
endUsers.deleteConfirm: Delete this end-user? Their connections and runs will be removed.
webhooks.urlHint: HTTPS required. The endpoint must respond within 15 seconds.
webhooks.secretWarning: This secret will not be shown again. Copy it now.
webhooks.rotateConfirm: The old secret will remain valid for 24h. Continue?
webhooks.eventsRequired: Please select at least one event.
integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: AFPS integration catalogue — connect third-party services to your agents.
integrations.empty.active: No active integrations. Activate one from the "Installed" tab.
integrations.empty.all: No integrations available in this organization.
integrations.activate.hint: Activate this integration to configure its connections and access.
integrations.deactivate.confirm: Deactivate this integration? Connections and settings are kept and reused if you reactivate it.
integration.tools.intro: Effective catalog of tools exposed to the agent. Sourced from the referenced mcp-server (MCPB) minus explicitly hidden tools and connect.tool primitives (run-start).
integration.tools.wildcardNotice.title: Wildcard tools permitted
integration.tools.wildcardNotice.body: This integration lets an agent opt into every tool the upstream MCP server advertises via tools: "*". The catalog below is indicative — additional tools may appear at runtime. OAuth scopes used will be the selected auth's default_scopes.
integration.auth.none: This integration declares no authentication — nothing to connect.
integration.clients.title: Available clients
integration.config.noOAuthClient: This auth method uses no OAuth client — nothing to configure here.
integration.oauthClient.autoProvisionedH: This MCP integration registers its OAuth client automatically at connect time (DCR). You don't need to enter anything — just connect.
integration.field.author: Author
integration.auth.noClientHint: No OAuth client configured — an administrator must register one before an account can be connected.
integration.auth.noClientHintAdmin: Connections are locked until the OAuth client above is registered.
integration.admin.accessRules.title: Access rules
integration.admin.accessRules.help: Org policy: who may connect, default connection, per-agent exceptions.
integration.admin.blockUserConnections.h: When enabled, only admins can create connections to this integration. Combine with an admin-shared connection to force all users onto it.
integration.connection.shareWithOrg.help: Other members will be able to use this connection for their runs.
integration.connection.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete this connection? It will be removed from every agent and schedule that uses it.
integration.connect.modal.title: Connect {{display}}
integration.connect.modal.subtitle: Auth type: {{type}}
integration.connect.hosted.title: Connect {{display}}
integration.connect.hosted.errorBody: This connect link is invalid, expired, or already used. Start the connection again from the app.
integration.connect.hosted.browserIntera: The secure browser is ready. Open it to complete any human check, SMS, email, or 2FA step requested by the site.
integration.connect.hosted.browserWaitin: Keep this window open. The connection will resume automatically when the check is complete.
integration.connect.hosted.companionBody: Recommended: sign in with Chrome on this computer. Your password stays on your machine; only session data limited to authorized domains is transferred and verified.
integration.oauthClient.callbackUrlHint: Callback to register at the provider
integration.oauthClient.delete.confirm: Delete the OAuth client for this auth?
integration.popup.blocked: OAuth popup was blocked — allow popups for this site and try again.
integration.popup.timeout: Connection timed out. Please try again.
integration.popup.failed: Couldn't start the connection. Please try again.
agentEditor.integrations.authKey.label: Auth method
agentEditor.integrations.apiCall.label: Generic API call (api_call)
agentEditor.integrations.apiCall.descrip: Lets the agent make authenticated HTTP calls to this integration. Credentials are injected server-side; the scopes below bound the access.
agentEditor.integrations.apiCall.labelWi: Generic API call + file upload (api_call + api_upload)
agentEditor.integrations.apiCall.descrip: Lets the agent make authenticated HTTP calls to this integration, and upload large workspace files over a chunked resumable protocol (api_upload). Both tools are granted together: every chunk travels through api_call. Credentials are injected server-side; the scopes below bound the access.
agentEditor.integrations.wildcard.label: Include all upstream tools (advanced)
agentEditor.integrations.wildcard.descri: Expose every tool the remote MCP server advertises to the agent, including tools that aren't enumerated in the manifest. Available only when the integration permits it.
agentEditor.integrations.wildcard.scopes: OAuth scopes will use the selected auth's default scopes — per-tool selection and scope inference are disabled.
agentEditor.integrations.tools.title: Allowed tools
agentEditor.integrations.tools.noneNotic: No tool selected — the integration is declared but exposes nothing to the agent. Tick the tools you need or use "Select all".
agentEditor.integrations.tools.explicitN: Only the ticked tools will be exposed to the agent at runtime. Required OAuth scopes are inferred automatically.
agentEditor.integrations.scopes.inferred: Computed automatically from the tools selected above. These scopes will be requested on the next OAuth consent.
agentEditor.integrations.scopes.pinnedHi: Manually pinned scope — will be requested even when no tool requires it.
agentEditor.integrations.scopes.advanced: Reserved for edge cases: scope orthogonal to tools (e.g. user:email for a side-effect), future-proofing before adding tools, or completing a manifest where required_scopes is under-declared. Otherwise, ticking tools is enough — scopes are inferred.
agentEditor.integrations.tools.noCatalog: This integration declares neither a `tools` block nor a `scope_catalog` in its manifest — nothing to pick. If you expected a picker, check that the source manifest declares them and restart the API server to resync.
agentEditor.integrations.tools.detailUna: Could not load the integration detail — make sure it is visible in this application.
